Sinu loo järgmine peatükk: The next chapter of your story
Uus tasand ja kõrgus Loo alevikus on var: A new level and height in Loo borough is soon becoming a reality. Right in the heart of the borough, at Saha tee 8, the area’s tallest landmark is rising – an elegant apartment building with comfortable, modern, and secure homes. On the first and second floors, selected businesses and services will take their place, enriching the living environment in a positive way. The building will be completed in the spring of 2026.
Aadressile Saha tee 8 kerkib uus 8-korru: At Saha tee 8, a new 8-story A energy class apartment building is rising. On the first two floors are commercial spaces, from the third to eighth floor are one- to four-room homes. The new Loo landmark, amidst low-rise buildings, offers bright, spacious and far-reaching views.
Hoone rajamisel on peamisteks väärtustek: The main values in building construction are quality, energy efficiency, functionality and durability. Home seekers can participate in planning adjustments according to their family preferences at an early stage. Interior finishing choices offer exceptionally high-level materials, allowing the creation of a personalized home.
Kodu otse Loo südames: Home right in the heart of Loo
Elu väljaspool pealinna, kus on aega roh: Life outside the capital, where there's more time and less stress. Saha tee 8 - Uus Loo
Loo on rohealade ja parkide rikas rahuli: Loo is a peaceful living environment rich in green areas and parks, where everything daily is within walking distance. The car ride to Tallinn city center is traffic-free and takes only 15 minutes. Here await cozy small streets with cycling paths, there's a cultural center, stadium as well as a sports facility with swimming pool and tennis court. The sandy beach by Pirita river is only a 6-minute walk away. The new family doctor center is moving to the second floor of the planned building, the shop is across the street. For pet lovers, there's a separate dog walking park. Dream logistics for family life - the local Pääsupesa kindergarten is only a 3-minute walk away. School children can safely reach the recently renovated Loo Secondary School also with just a 3-minute walk. For small children, a modern daycare will open on the first floor of the same building. Green areas, playgrounds and cycling paths are in every direction of movement. Young people are offered hobby and sports circles, including the Youth Center with skate ramps.
Projekti veab tuntud arendaja: The project is led by a renowned developer
HAUSERS on kinnisvaraarenduse ja ehituse: HAUSERS is a company engaged in real estate development and general contracting. Most of our projects are designed and built by ourselves, meaning we are involved in building construction from the first idea to its completion, ensuring the quality of the final result. Our priorities are high construction quality, reliable relationships with our partners and customer satisfaction.
Olete huvitatud UusLoo korterite müügist: Are you interested in UusLoo apartment sales or would you like more information about the project? Fill out the inquiry form below and we will respond to you soon. We help find an apartment that suits your needs.
Müüjal on õigus müümata korterite hindas: The seller reserves the right to change prices of unsold apartments.
Minimalistlik modernne boho pakett toob: The minimalist modern boho package brings a light and spacious atmosphere to your home, dominated by bright tones and natural materials. Combining contemporary minimalism and bohemian coziness, the result is a peaceful and harmonious living environment. An excellent balance between simplicity and personality creates a unique and stylish space. Ideal for those who value closeness to nature and comfort.
Skandinaavialik japandi pakett ühendab e: The Scandinavian japandi package combines Nordic coziness with Japanese style simplicity. This package offers a warm and inviting interior where natural materials and soft textures create a peaceful atmosphere. Wooden floors, neutral color palettes and minimalist furniture give the space openness and clarity. An ideal choice for those seeking tranquility and balance in their home.
Kaasaegne modernne minimalism pakett pak: The contemporary modern minimalism package offers a stylish and luxurious living environment dominated by clean lines and crisp tones. Monochrome color palettes and minimalist furniture pieces create a spacious and airy space. The design centers on functionality and aesthetics, offering a comfortable and contemporary living environment. A perfect choice for those who value luxury and elegance in everyday life.
UusLoo hoonest saab Loo aleviku uus maam: The UusLoo building will become Loo borough's new landmark – striking and representative.
Asukohalt aleviku täielikus tsentris ja: Located in the complete center and heart of the borough, it gathers people and life in its moderately peaceful core.
Esimesel ja teisel korrusel leiavad koha: On the first and second floors, selected businesses and services will find their place, positively enriching the living environment and community life, while not disturbing the residential environment in the building. All first-floor commercial spaces have separate entrances directly from the street. By the local government, a family doctor and health center is coming to the building, located on the side of the building with a private and separate staircase, and a daycare, located in a separate section in the protruding courtyard-side part.
Saha tee 8 ühendab endas meeldiva elukes: Saha tee 8 combines a pleasant living environment with a small town business environment. The building offers opportunities for office spaces, small shops, cafes, restaurants and other value-adding services. Commercial spaces are available in sizes from 48 m² to 140 m².
Võta ühendust ja uuri saadavust lähemalt: Contact us and inquire about availability!
Saha tee 8 äripindadega korterelamu ener: The energy efficiency number based on energy calculations for the apartment building with commercial spaces at Saha tee 8 corresponds to class A.
Hoone rõdud ehitatakse praktiliste ja va: The building's balconies are built as practical and durable reinforced concrete elements. Balconies are solved with metal and composite panel railings. Third-floor roof terraces are solved with decking.
3.-8.korruse korterite lagede kõrgused o: The ceiling heights of apartments on floors 3-8 are higher than usual, around 2.8 meters. In bathrooms and hallways, there are gypsum board suspended ceilings with heights of at least 2.3 meters.
Korteritel on soojapidavad 3-kordse klaa: Apartments have heat-retaining PVC windows with triple glazing. Apartment exterior doors are fire-resistant veneered wooden doors. Interior doors are 210 cm high and in their finishing, it's possible to choose between painted panel doors, painted smooth doors or veneer-finished wooden doors.
Korterite vahelised seinad on helikindlu: Walls between apartments are 200 mm thick reinforced concrete panels or fully concreted 190mm concrete hollow blocks to ensure sound insulation. Interior apartment walls are metal frame walls with gypsum board covering. In the center of the building is the apartment staircase, accessible from both the front of the building and the courtyard. A spacious 13-person elevator is designed into the building, which comfortably accommodates both baby strollers and wheelchairs.
Hoone 1.korruse kandekonstruktsioonideks: The load-bearing structures of the building's 1st floor are monolithic reinforced concrete columns, beams and walls, covered by hollow panel intermediate floors. Starting from the 2nd floor, the load-bearing frame consists of assembled 1- and 3-layer reinforced concrete elements.
Hoone on ühendatud piirkonna kaugküttesü: The building is connected to the district heating system. Room-based adjustable water underfloor heating ensures comfortable and energy-efficient indoor climate. Heating pipe collector cabinets are installed in hallway cabinets or utility rooms. Quality and economical air exchange and indoor air is ensured by an individual device heat recovery forced ventilation system for apartments and commercial spaces. Extraction channels are installed for kitchen hoods.
Hooned on ühendatud tsentraalsesse vee-: Buildings are connected to the central water and sewerage network. Hot domestic water is prepared in the building's heat exchanger. Water meter readings are taken by remote reading, readings are automatically read and directed to the administrator's database.
Hoovipoolse parkla parkimiskohtadele on: For parking spaces in the courtyard parking lot, it's possible to order an electric car charger or its readiness. Smart electric car charging is solved in the building, equipped with dynamic load distribution that monitors building consumption and directs free unused power to chargers.
Hoovipoolne parkla on eraldatud tõkkepuu: The courtyard parking is separated by barriers and contains apartment owners' private parking spaces. Parking spaces solved on the front side of the building, Saha tee side, are regulated by parking organization traffic signs and are for business visitors and/or apartment owners' private parking spaces. Public parking spaces will be built on the Loopargi tee side of the building.
Hoone katusele on paigaldatud päikesepan: A solar panel park is installed on the building's roof with a total capacity of about 50 kW. Electricity produced with solar energy supports the building's electrical system, reducing energy purchased from the grid and increasing environmental sustainability. Panel placement is optimized to achieve maximum productivity year-round.
Jalgrataste ja vankrite ruum ning panipa: Bicycle and stroller room and storage spaces
Korterite trepikojast on võimalik mugava: From the apartment staircase, there's convenient access to the shared bicycle and stroller room. Wall-mounted bicycle holders will be installed in this room and an area for stroller storage will be created. The private storage area is accessible from the courtyard side of the building. There's also a bicycle maintenance station in the private storage corridor.
Hoone hoovis rohealal asuv mänguväljak o: The playground located in the green area of the building's courtyard is fenced and shared – during daycare working hours it's exclusively for daycare use, and at the end of the workday and on weekends it's for building residents' use.
Liikumisraskustega inimeste liikumisvõim: Mobility options for people with mobility difficulties
Korteri trepikodade sissepääsud on tänav: Apartment staircase entrances are at street level to facilitate movement with strollers or wheelchairs. The building elevator accommodates both strollers or wheelchairs along with other passengers.
Hoonemahu esimesele korrusele asuvad äri: Commercial spaces located on the first floor of the building volume have entrances from street level and directly from outside, without going through the staircase. For the Family Doctor and Health Center located on the second floor, a separate staircase is designed on the Toom park side and this staircase is equipped with a disabled lift.
Everything starts with choosing a suitable apartment. Once done, contact our sales representative and express interest in apartment reservation. Verbal reservation is free and valid for up to 7 days (not shown on website). For written reservation, a simple written reservation agreement is concluded with a fee of 3000 euros, valid until the next stage – notarial debt contract.
Enne ehituse algust või hoone ehitusjärg: Before the start of construction or during the building construction phase, a notarial debt contract is concluded with the Buyer, with which 10% of the apartment price is paid. If a reservation agreement has been concluded previously, the reservation fee is counted into the down payment. More precise sales conditions and schedule are agreed upon in the debt sales contract.
Kui korter ja hoone on valmis, sõlmitaks: When the apartment and building are ready, a notarial property rights contract is concluded, which involves the transfer of ownership rights of the contract object, apartment possession is transferred along with keys. With AÕL, the client must pay the remaining 90% of the apartment purchase price. When involving bank financing, a bank representative also participates in this contract and pays out the amount according to the loan agreement.
Uue kodu sisustuseks kingitusena 5000 eu: 5000 euros in credit as a gift for furnishing your new home or a discount on an apartment of the same value!
Korteritel on soojapidavad 3-kordse klaa: Apartments have heat-retaining PVC windows with triple glazing. Apartment exterior doors are fire-resistant veneered wooden doors. Interior doors are 210 cm high and in their finishing, it's possible to choose between painted panel doors, painted smooth doors or veneer-finished wooden doors.
Hoone ja korteri valmidus vastavalt proj: Building and apartment readiness according to the project and interior finishing table;
Standard viimistlusmaterjalid vastavalt: Standard finishing materials according to client's choice;
Tasu tehnovõrkude (elektri-, vee- ja kan: Fee for construction and connection of utility networks (electricity, water and sewerage lines).
Korteri hinnas ei sisaldu:: Not included in the apartment price:
Isiklik parkimiskoht tõkkepuuga parklas: Private parking space in gated parking lot priced at 4900€ (optional);
Isiklik panipaik hoone 1. korrusel hinna: Private storage space on the 1st floor of the building priced at 3900€ (optional);
Köögimööbel (valikuline lisatasu alusel: Kitchen furniture (optional for additional fee or within sales campaign);
Siseviimistluspakettide lisatasu valikud: Additional fee options for interior finishing packages;
Müügilepingu sõlmimisega seotud notarita: Notary fees and state fees related to signing the sales contract;
Liitumistasu telefoniside, andmeside, ka: Connection fees for telephone, data communication, cable television network and security alarm system.
Kuni 31.10.2025 (või kuni 8 korteri müüg: Until October 31, 2025 (or until 8 apartments are sold), a campaign organized by Hausers is valid, within which a new apartment buyer receives a gift card worth 5000 € from one freely chosen interior store or is offered a discount of the same value on the apartment. The campaign is valid for the specified period. The campaign is organized by Hausers and Hausers has the right to change the campaign conditions.
Kui kaasate kodu ostmiseks laenu, siis s: If you involve a loan for home purchase, we recommend starting to map out loan possibilities before or at the latest during reservation. A loan agreement can be concluded in advance, during construction or a couple of months before building completion. Note that loan repayment begins only after loan disbursement, which happens after apartment completion with the property rights contract signing.
Piiratud aja pakkumisena saavad korterio: As a limited-time offer, apartment buyers get a storage room for free! The offer applies only to residential apartments. More information from sales representatives.
Kui rahastad uue kodu ostu oma vana kodu: If you finance your new home purchase from selling your old home, it's worth involving professionals in the process. If needed, we'll direct you to our cooperation partners, where a real estate agent will help evaluate your property value, estimated sales period and when to start selling, so that by the time your new home is ready, the old one would be sold.
Paindlik ostuvõimalus – vaid 5% sissemak: Flexible purchase option - with just a 5% down payment
Korteri broneerimiseks ja võlaõiguslepin: For apartment reservation and debt contract signing, only 5% of the purchase price is required. Payment of the remaining amount takes place later, according to the agreement.
See annab võimaluse tegeleda rahulikult: This gives you the opportunity to calmly handle the sale of your current home or arrange financing before making the final transaction.
The campaign is organized by Hausers.
Kui rahastad uue kodu ostu oma vana kodu: If you finance your new home purchase from selling your old home, it's worth involving professionals in the process. If needed, we'll direct you to our cooperation partners, where a real estate agent will help evaluate your property value, estimated sales period and when to start selling, so that by the time your new home is ready, the old one would be sold.
Tegemist on külaliskorteriga. Küsi lisa!: This is a guest apartment. Ask for more information!
Hoonel on kaugloetavad elektriarvestid,: The building has remotely readable electricity meters located in the meter cabinets. The electrical and low-voltage part of the apartment cabinet is located in the hallway cabinet wall or utility room. Switches, sockets and recessed ceiling lights selected by the interior designer are installed in the apartment at selected locations. The balconies of the apartments are equipped with lighting and sockets suitable for outdoor conditions. Technical readiness is provided for signing contracts for telephone, internet and TV services with different providers.
